_instructions: Recorded ChatGPT baseline (GTM Phase 1 kill-criterion comparison).
Recorded by founder 2026-07-13 per the protocol in chatgpt_refinement.template.json.
Curation notes (transparency): entries kept verbatim from ChatGPT's first answers.

Two mechanical corrections made in ChatGPT's favour: RF-001 'King's Cross Station (Platform 9 3/4)' split into two places so the platform gets credited; RF-007 paste artifact 'Torre BellesguardColonia Guell Crypt' split into its two constituent places.
RF-016 (Bengaluru) was recorded with no places.

cases.prompt_to_paste: I'm planning a 5-day leisure trip to London, United Kingdom. I'm a huge Harry Potter fan — please work some real HP places into this trip! List the specific places you'd include.
places: Warner Bros. Studio Tour London – The Making of Harry Potter

cases.prompt_to_paste: I'm planning a 5-day leisure trip to Edinburgh, United Kingdom. We're big Harry Potter nerds — where was JK Rowling actually writing? Add those spots. List the specific places you'd include.
places: Finish with drinks or afternoon tea at The Balmoral Hotel

cases.prompt_to_paste: I'm planning a 5-day leisure trip to Tokyo, Japan. I'm really into anime and Studio Ghibli — can you add proper anime places? List the specific places you'd include.
I'm planning a 5-day leisure trip to Kyoto, Japan. I love zen gardens and quiet temples — make sure the famous zen spots are in. List the specific places you'd include.

I'm planning a 5-day leisure trip to Liverpool, United Kingdom. Massive Beatles fan here — build the trip around the real Beatles landmarks. List the specific places you'd include.
I'm planning a 5-day leisure trip to Los Angeles, United States. I want the movie-studio experience — real working studios and film history, please. List the specific places you'd include.
I'm planning a 5-day leisure trip to Singapore. We're food travellers — hawker centres are the whole point. Add the legendary ones. List the specific places you'd include.
places: Marine Parade Central Market & Food Centre

cases.prompt_to_paste: I'm planning a 5-day leisure trip to Delhi, India. I'm fascinated by Mughal history — the real monuments, not just markets. List the specific places you'd include.

places: Church and Convent of St. Francis of Assisi
Ruins of the Church of St. Augustine
Our Lady of the Immaculate Conception Church
Church of Our Lady of the Rosary
